summary: Iteration 51: Bet Type Limits Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly. Validation working for disabled types and min/max limits.
critical_code_review_comments: bet_type_limits_routes.py: All 8 game types supported (BORLETTE, LOTO3, MARIAGE, L4O1, L4O2, L4O3, L5O1, L5O2)

universal_pos_routes.py: PHASE 4 validation at line 530 correctly calls validate_bet_type_limits()
CompanyBetLimitsPage.jsx: All 8 game types displayed with toggle, min_bet, max_bet, max_per_number inputs
VendeurNouvelleVente.jsx: BET_TYPES filtered based on betTypeLimits[backendKey].enabled (lines 114-119)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bet type limits feature fully functional. L4O3 currently disabled for testing. All 8 game types configurable via /company/bet-limits page.
